synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1831 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 qemu-kvm security update
description:
[10.0.0-14.el10_1.5]
- kvm-Revert-i386-cpu-Move-adjustment-of-CPUID_EXT_PDCM-be.patch [RHEL-135453]
- Resolves: RHEL-135453
  (Live migration after workload update fails with operation failed: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm [rhel-10.1.z])

[10.0.0-14.el10_1.4]
- kvm-file-posix-Handle-suspended-dm-multipath-better-for-.patch [RHEL-133521]
- kvm-block-backend-Fix-race-when-resuming-queued-requests.patch [RHEL-133527]
- Resolves: RHEL-133521
  (The VM hit io error when do S3-PR integration on the pass-through  failover multipath device [rhel-10.1.z])
- Resolves: RHEL-133527
  (Assertion failure on drain with iothread and I/O load [rhel-10.1.z])

[10.0.0-14.el10_1.3]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-fix-interaction-with-hugetlb-me.patch [RHEL-129549]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-Unify-the-retrieval-of-the-bloc.patch [RHEL-129549]
- Resolves: RHEL-129549
  ([RHEL 10]snp guest fail to boot with hugepage [rhel-10.1.z])

[10.0.0-14.el10_1.2]
- kvm-io-move-websock-resource-release-to-close-method.patch [RHEL-120118]
- kvm-io-fix-use-after-free-in-websocket-handshake-code.patch [RHEL-120118]
- Resolves: RHEL-120118
  (CVE-2025-11234 qemu-kvm: VNC WebSocket handshake use-after-free [rhel-10.1.z])

[10.0.0-14.el10_1.1]
- kvm-arm-kvm-report-registers-we-failed-to-set.patch [RHEL-120074]
- Resolves: RHEL-120074
  ([rhel10] Backport "arm/kvm: report registers we failed to set" [rhel-10.1.z])
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1831

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1831.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
qemu-guest-agent-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-img-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-audio-pa-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-blkio-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-curl-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-rbd-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-common-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-core-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-pci-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-vga-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-host-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-redirect-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-docs-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-tools-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-ui-egl-headless-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-ui-opengl-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm
qemu-pr-helper-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
qemu-guest-agent-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-img-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-audio-pa-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-blkio-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-curl-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-block-rbd-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-common-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-core-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-pci-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-host-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-redirect-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-docs-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-tools-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm
qemu-pr-helper-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/qemu-kvm-10.0.0-14.el10_1.5.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-11234
